name_cn:
Chane1 New 22 Bag is here!!️
Original leather 22 Black Silver Medium: 3260
✨Hot new arrival Chane1 22Bag
Whether called a "trash bag" or a "shopping bag"
It just hits the spot 🍃
Those named after year numbers should look at this!!
Absolutely the ceiling of classics ✔️
This look is amazing, practical and beautiful.
Casual soft texture, creates its own style when worn.
Hardware: Thick plated vintage silver buckle
Leather: Original calf leather
Size: 35*37*8 cm
9788025
